listeners.purpose: Dispatch SeedDefaultOrganizationForTenantJob for the newly-provisioned tenant. Runs post-commit so the tenant row is guaranteed durable before the child insert.

Cascade hard-delete of every Organization for the erased tenant. FK cascade handles the actual delete; this listener writes the compliance audit trail entry + releases every organization_slot entitlement for the tenant.
When a tenant is suspended, every active Organization transitions to paused (via a batch update). Reverses on TenantResumed.

Reverse of PauseOrganizationsForSuspendedTenant. Transitions organizations paused by the tenant-suspend cascade back to active. Rows paused BEFORE the tenant suspension (independent pause events) stay paused — recorded in `paused_before_tenant_suspend=true` metadata.
Sync-dispatch RebuildTreePathsJob for the moved subtree. Kept sync (not queued) so the cache-invalidation window is exactly the job duration.
Invalidates `org:default:{tenant_id}` Redis key so the next request re-warms with the new default.
Recompute `org:slot_usage:{tenant_id}` from source of truth after each create so the entitlement-bar UI stays accurate.
Releases 1 unit of the organization_slot entitlement counter.
Re-consumes 1 unit of the organization_slot entitlement counter (restore fails when the tenant is at cap).

When a tenant loses the organization_hierarchy entitlement (downgrade Enterprise → Medium), FLATTEN the tree — every non-default child Organization has its parent_id set to null (children reparent to the tenant root). Handled per hierarchy.md §10 tier-transition rules. Emits OrganizationParentChanged for each row so downstream tree caches invalidate.
